label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The question is asking whether George intentionally hit the high point region of the dart board in his final shot during the dart game with his sister Lena. Let me break down the scenario: 1. George and Lena are at their parents' house for Thanksgiving. 2. George just got into medical school, while Lena is unhappy and recently lost her job. 3. They have heated arguments throughout the day. 4. They play a game of darts, splitting the first two games, with the third game close until the end. 5. The outcome of the third game depends on George's last shot. 6. If George hits a high point region, he wins; if he hits a low point region, Lena wins. 7. George really wants to beat Lena and doesn't care about Lena's difficult situation. 8. George has little control over his shots. 9. He tries to aim at the high point region. 10. As he sets up his shot, he loses his balance. 11. The dart slips out of his hand and wobbles toward the board. 12. The dart lands in the high point region. 13. George wins, Lena is sad.
